pokemon:skuntank.name: Skuntank
pokemon:skuntank.summary: It sprays a stinky fluid from its tail. The fluid smells worse the longer it is allowed to fester.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It sprays a stinky fluid from its tail. The fluid smells worse the longer it is allowed to fester.
It attacks by spraying a horribly smelly fluid from the tip of its tail. Attacks from above confound it.
It attacks by spraying a horribly smelly fluid from the tip of its tail. Attacks from above confound it.
It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.
It attacks by spraying a repugnant fluid from its tail, but the stench dulls after a few squirts.
Sprays a poisonous fluid to take down prey. Sometimes, unable to stomach the stench of its own fluid, it leaves the bested prey uneaten.
It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.
It sprays a stinky fluid from its tail. The fluid smells worse the longer it is allowed to fester.
It attacks by spraying a horribly smelly fluid from the tip of its tail. Attacks from above confound it.
It digs holes in the ground to make its nest. The stench of the fluid it lets fly from the tip of its tail is extremely potent.
It attacks by spraying a repugnant fluid from its tail, but the stench dulls after a few squirts.
In its belly, it reserves stinky fluid that it shoots from its tail during battle. As this Pokémon’s diet varies, so does the stench of its fluid.
It attacks by spraying a horribly smelly fluid from the tip of its tail. Attacks from above confound it.
It attacks by spraying a horribly smelly fluid from the tip of its tail. Attacks from above confound it.
It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.
It sprays a stinky fluid from its tail. The fluid smells worse the longer it is allowed to fester.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It sprays a stinky fluid from its tail. The fluid smells worse the longer it is allowed to fester.

pokemon:stunky.name: Stunky
pokemon:stunky.summary: It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.
It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. Its stench spreads over a mile radius, driving Pokémon away.
It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. Its stench spreads over a mile radius, driving Pokémon away.
It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.
The foul fluid from its rear is so revolting that it can make people feel queasy up to a mile and a quarter away.
The poison that gushes from its aft end is accompanied by an utterly evil-smelling odor with such potency that one whiff can induce memory loss.
It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. Its stench spreads over a mile radius, driving Pokémon away.
It sprays a nose-curling, stinky fluid from its rear to repel attackers.
It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. Its stench spreads over a mile radius, driving Pokémon away.
If it lifts its tail and points its rear at you, beware. It’s about to spray you with a fluid stinky enough to make you faint.
The foul fluid from its rear is so revolting that it can make people feel queasy up to a mile and a quarter away.
From its rear, it sprays a foul-smelling liquid at opponents. It aims for their faces, and it can hit them from over 16 feet away.
It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. Its stench spreads over a mile radius, driving Pokémon away.
It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. Its stench spreads over a mile radius, driving Pokémon away.
It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. Its stench spreads over a mile radius, driving Pokémon away.
It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.
